name: Russian Folk Songs. The Whole Truth About Fairy Tales
original_name: Русские народные. Вся правда о сказках
overview: Russian fairy tales are the most famous and colorful part of Russian cultural traditions. Everyone is used to thinking that these are just magical stories created solely for entertainment and to read them to children at night. But sometimes fairy tales tell us much more about our ancestors and the past than historical sources and expert research. They contain many mysteries and mysteries that have carried through the centuries a direct connection with modernity.
